calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pauline Ungson Mallette appeared in person (pro per).


There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated 08/08/2025 is admitted to probate. Pauline Ungson Mallette is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority/limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 02, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Disclosure: The assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
